citations.desc: Access and inspection of records and property; submission of itineraries.
citations.narrative:
A responsible adult was not available to accompany APHIS Officials during the inspection process at 12:30 PM on
01/30/2025. The inspector attempted to contact the licensee by calling on the phone and sending text messages. The
licensee explained not being available for inspection at the time. Failure to provide access to the facility, animals, and
records for inspection is a violation of the AWA and regulations. Continued failure to provide access is serious and may
result in enforcement action.
End Section

narrative:
2.126(b) 
   
Access and inspection of records and property; submission of itineraries. 
A responsible adult was not available to accompany APHIS Officials during the inspection process at 12:30 PM on 
01/30/2025. The inspector attempted to contact the licensee by calling on the phone and sending text messages. The 
licensee explained not being available for inspection at the time. Failure to provide access to the facility, animals, and 
records for inspection is a violation of the AWA and regulations. Continued failure to provide access is serious and may 
result in enforcement action. 
 
 
End Section
